HOW TO BUY

01

Get a Solana Wallet

Download Phantom, Solflare, or Backpack. Fund it with some SOL.

02

Head to a DEX

Open Jupiter, Raydium, or any Solana DEX of your choice.

03

Paste the Contract

Copy the $CLUTCH contract above and paste it in the swap input.

04

Swap & Soar

Confirm the trade. Welcome to the flock. 🦅
